what_was_requested: ETAP 4: Integration and validation - combine all PROMOTED/WATCHLIST features from stages 1-3 with cf_vol_term_spread, test integrated strategy vs baseline, run walk-forward and ownership analysis
what_was_done: 1. Cloned baseline snapshot 'active-signal-v1' into 'integrated_v3'. 2. Composed integration signal logic adding cf_vol_term_spread > 0.05/-0.05, cf_cumulative_delta > 0/< 0, and cf_trend_acceleration > 0/< 0 as AND gates to baseline signals (long: sum>=4, short: sum>=3). 3. Validated both long and short signal logic via backtests_strategy_validate. 4. Saved snapshot as integrated_v3@4. 5. Ran full-history backtest (2023-01-01 to 2024-12-31). 6. Results: net_pnl=-$11.94, trades=161, PF=0.99, WR=41.6%, max_dd=3.14%. This is severe degradation vs baseline ($1308.65, 498 trades, DD 2.4%) AND vs cf_vol_term_spread standalone ($1496.34, 330 trades, DD 1.68%). 7. Skipped walk-forward and ownership analysis due to clear negative results. 8. Recorded REJECT verdict as research decision (node-b74926b9a0834a2499a9d8ff5d7fa6ef) explaining that AND-gate combination of all 3 features is too restrictive, cannibalizing signal quality and reducing trade frequency.
